goal: 给 Catty dogfood health 增加 memory candidate gate

summary.title: 增加 Catty dogfood health memory candidate gate
summary.what: 在 dogfood-health dry-run 输出中新增 memoryCandidateGate：结构化暴露 memory candidate 阶段的状态、candidate 分类摘要、低分 miss 来源、model-backed judged 样本数和下一步安全命令。补充测试覆盖两条关键路径：只有 Stub/prediction-eval 低分 miss 而 model 样本高分时，gate 标记 needs_model_backed_low_score_miss；当前上下文已采样时，gate 的命令跟随 sampleGate 降级为只读 shadow dry-run，而不是建议继续写 Pi 样本。
summary.why: 当前 live dogfood 卡在 no_user_prior_candidates：低分 miss 全是 Stub/prediction-eval，model 样本不是低分 miss，同时当前 Chrome localhost 上下文已重复采样。只靠 blocker 文案和 sourceQuality 需要后续 agent 人工拼读，容易误把 candidate blocker 理解成可以立刻写 Pi 样本。memoryCandidateGate 把候选阶段单独机器可读化，减少污染 dogfood 的风险。
summary.user_goal: 给 Catty dogfood health 增加 memory candidate gate

decisions.chose: 只增强 dogfood-health 的只读输出，不写 user memory、不写 canary、不接 heartbeat、不调用模型。
decisions.rationale: 本轮服务当前 blocker 的可诊断性，不改变 v0 数据流或执行边界。

decisions.point: candidate gate 与 sample gate 的关系
decisions.chose: memoryCandidateGate 表达 candidate 阶段缺什么；当 sampleGate 已经判定 repeated-context 时，memoryCandidateGate 的命令使用 sampleGate 的只读 dry-run 命令。
decisions.rationale: 这样既能说明需要 model-backed low-score miss，又不会诱导在重复上下文里继续写 Pi 样本。

decisions.chose: 把历史 overlap 作为同一 catty 分支上的顺序 dogfood-health/candidate/readiness 切片处理。
decisions.rationale: 本轮只修改 src/catty/dogfood-health.ts 和 src/catty/dogfood-health.test.ts，和前序切片是递进增强，不改变它们的语义或安全边界。

rejected.alternative: 直接再写一个 Pi shadow 样本
rejected.reason: live samplingFreshness 显示当前上下文已经由 pred_mpn65un6_v83tq32i 采样，继续写会增加重复样本而不是产出真实 miss。
长期推进 agent 需要机器可读状态，不能靠解析中文文案决定下一步是否写样本。

review_notes: TDD RED: bun test src/catty/dogfood-health.test.ts 先失败于 result.memoryCandidateGate 不存在。
TDD RED: repeated-context 场景先失败于 memoryCandidateGate.command 仍为 envchain mom bun src/catty/shadow.ts --pi --write。
验证通过: bun test src/catty/dogfood-health.test.ts，6 pass。
验证通过: bun test src/catty/*.test.ts，79 pass。
验证通过: bun test，87 pass。
验证通过: git diff --check 和 git diff --cached --check 均无输出。
live dogfood-health 回读: readiness=blocked，memoryCandidateGate.status=needs_model_backed_low_score_miss，candidateSummary predictionEval=2/userPriorCandidates=0，命令为 bun src/catty/shadow.ts --limit 80。
live runtime 回读: bun src/ops.ts status --json --live 显示 ok=true，launchd loaded=true，lastExitCode=0，diagnostics.needsAttention=false。
无关 CLAUDE.md 保持 unstaged dirty，未触碰也未纳入提交。

architectural_claims: dogfood-health now exposes a separate machine-readable gate for the memory candidate stage instead of forcing agents to infer candidate state from blockers and sourceQuality text.
memoryCandidateGate remains read-only and side-effect free; it does not alter prediction, judgement, canary, memory admission, heartbeat, or model-call behavior.
behavioral_changes: inspectCattyDogfoodHealth output now includes memoryCandidateGate with candidateSummary, lowScoreMisses, highScoreModelSamples, modelJudgedSamples, status, reason, command, and safetyBoundary.
When no user-prior candidate exists because low-score misses are Stub/prediction-eval only while model samples are high scoring, memoryCandidateGate reports needs_model_backed_low_score_miss.
When the current context is repeated, memoryCandidateGate command follows sampleGate and points to bun src/catty/shadow.ts --limit 80 instead of a Pi write command.

api_changes.signature: bun src/catty/dogfood-health.ts JSON output includes memoryCandidateGate

security_implications: No secrets are read or printed; the new gate only summarizes already available dogfood-health dry-run inputs.
No user memory, canary state, prediction rows, audit rows, heartbeat config, or model provider calls are written or invoked.
migration_notes: No schema migration is required; this is an additive JSON output field.
